title: Codereview pass 1: DutyCycleTracker with_duty_cycle accepts invalid duty cycle values
description: rust/lichen-core/src/duty_cycle.rs:79 - with_duty_cycle(f32) accepts any value including negative, NaN, infinity, or >1.0 which would cause nonsensical behavior (negative budget, infinite budget, etc.). Should either validate input with debug_assert! or use a validated wrapper type. Not P0 because callers control input, but footgun for maintainability.
